subject: English
chapter: The Case of the Fifth Word

activities_projects.title: Anagram Crossword Puzzle
activities_projects.objective: Develop vocabulary and word rearrangement skills
steps: Look at the crossword puzzle in the textbook
Solve the clues given as anagrams
Rearrange the letters to form correct words
Fill the answers in the crossword grid
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn to identify anagrams and improve spelling skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct completion of crossword puzzle (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Meanings of the Word 'Case'
activities_projects.objective: Understand different meanings of a single word in context
steps: Read the sentences given in Column 1
Match them with the correct meanings in Column 2
Discuss the different meanings of the word 'case'
Write the answers in the notebook
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand contextual meanings of words

activities_projects.title: Character Traits of Encyclopedia Brown
activities_projects.objective: Analyse the character of the main character
steps: Read the story carefully
Identify traits of Encyclopedia Brown
Find textual evidence supporting each trait
Share findings with classmates
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct identification of traits with examples (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Fact vs Opinion Activity
steps: Read the statements from the story
Decide whether each statement is a fact or an opinion
Write your answers in the notebook
Discuss the reasons with classmates

activities_projects.title: Decoding the Secret Message
activities_projects.objective: Understand how codes and clues can be used to solve mysteries
steps: Read the coded words 'Nom Utes Sweden Hurts'
Discuss how the words relate to days of the week
Identify the missing fifth word
Explain how Encyclopedia solved the mystery
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn logical reasoning and decoding techniques
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct explanation of the code and reasoning (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Phrasal Verbs Practice
activities_projects.objective: Learn common phrasal verbs used in the story
steps: Read the list of phrasal verbs in the textbook
Match them with their meanings
Use them to complete the given sentences
Write answers in the notebook
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve vocabulary and grammar usage
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct matching and sentence completion (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Word Pair Exercise
steps: Read the sentences with blanks
Choose the correct word from each pair
Write the correct word in the sentence
Discuss the difference between the word pairs
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve spelling and contextual vocabulary

activities_projects.title: Puzzle Solving Activity
activities_projects.objective: Enhance logical thinking through visual puzzles
steps: Observe the puzzle illustrations in the textbook
Interpret the clues shown in pictures
Write the correct phrases or meanings
Share answers with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve reasoning and problem-solving abilities

activities_projects.title: Direct and Indirect Speech Practice
steps: Read the direct speech sentences
Convert them into indirect speech
Apply tense and pronoun changes correctly
Write the transformed sentences in your notebook
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn grammar rules for reported speech

activities_projects.title: Group Discussion on Mystery Stories
steps: Form small discussion groups
Choose a moderator for the group
Discuss interesting aspects of mystery stories
Present the main points of discussion to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop communication and critical thinking skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Participation and clarity of ideas (10 marks)
